infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HD Manager can dung camera de chup anh so sach, hang hoa va bao cao giao hang.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HD Manager can dung micro de ghi am len don va phieu xuat kho.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HD Manager can truy cap thu vien anh de chon hinh anh bao cao.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: HD Manager can luu hinh anh hoac file chia se khi ban yeu cau.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HD Manager can dung vi tri de cham cong GPS va dinh vi khach hang.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: HD Manager can truy cap danh ba khi ban muon lay thong tin khach hang tu dien thoai.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: HD Manager can ket noi may chu noi bo tren cung WiFi khi test bang Expo hoac may tinh cong ty.
